title: 10 best herbal capsules for psoriasis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules help with psoriasis because of their potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and ease joint pain associated with the condition. The curcumin in turmeric capsules also has antioxidant effects, combating free radicals that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, turmeric's immunomodulatory properties may help regulate the immune system, reducing inflammation and preventing flare-ups. As a result, turmeric capsules can provide relief from psoriasis symptoms, promoting healthier skin and improved quality of life.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: A potent anti-inflammatory compound found in turmeric, which helps reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, common underlying causes of psoriasis.

Cyclooxygenase (COX) inhibition: Turmeric's curcumin content inhibits COX-2 enzymes, which are involved in the production of pro-inflammatory molecules that exacerbate psoriatic symptoms like redness, swelling, and pain.

Antioxidant activity: Turmeric's rich antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and contribute to psoriasis development; antioxidants also promote healthy cellular turnover and reduce inflammation.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: A polyphenolic compound that helps reduce inflammation and modulate the immune system, thereby alleviating the symptoms of psoriasis.
Demethoxycurcumin: A bioactive compound that inhibits the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to the development of psoriatic lesions.
Turmerone: A sesquiterpene that exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce skin inflammation and promote healing in psoriasis patients.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the primary source of curcumin, a bioactive compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate psoriasis symptoms.
Roots: Roots of Curcuma longa contain a rich source of curcuminoids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve skin health in individuals with psoriasis.

Stems: Stems of Curcuma longa contain compounds like curcumin and demethoxycurcumin, which have been found to have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, aiding in the management of psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10-15 dried curcuma longa rhizomes with at least 2% curcumin content to ensure potency.
Grind 3-4 grams of the dried rhizomes into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar.
Mix 2 grams of the curcuma longa powder with 1 gram of vegetable cellulose powder as a capsule filler.
Fill gelatin capsules with the powder mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with psoriasis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms such as redness, swelling, and itching. The bioactive compounds in ginger, including gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory molecules, thereby decreasing the severity of psoriatic lesions. Additionally, ginger's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from oxidative damage, promoting a healthier and more balanced skin environment.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, may help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis, including redness, swelling, and pain.
Antioxidant properties: Ginger's antioxidant compounds can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to the development of psoriasis and exacerbate its symptoms.

Immunomodulatory properties: Ginger may help modulate the immune system, reducing the overactive immune response that contributes to psoriasis and alleviating symptoms such as itching, scaling, and joint pain.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These sesquiterpene compounds exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis.
Shogaols: Similar to gingerols, shogaols have anti-inflammatory effects that can help mitigate psoriasis symptoms by reducing redness, itching, and inflammation.

Curcuminoids (specifically, 6-Gingerol and 8-Gingerol): These compounds have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: They are the most commonly used part due to their rich content of gingerols and shogaols, which are responsible for the anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties beneficial for treating psoriasis.
Roots: The roots of Zingiber officinale contain a compound called zingiberene, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis.
Buds: Ginger buds are another part used for psoriasis treatment due to their high content of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and promote healing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried zingiber officinale rhizomes with at least 5% of essential oil content.
Grind the dried rhizomes into fine powder using a mill or blender at 1000 rpm for 30 seconds.
Mix 1g of the zingiber officinale powder with 10g of gelatin powder in a bowl.
Add 20ml of purified water to the bowl and stir the mixture at 50 rpm for 2 minutes.
Fill 1000-count gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Frankincense capsules help with psoriasis because of their potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and redness associated with the condition. The boswellic acids in frankincense capsules also exhibit immunomodulatory effects, which can help regulate the immune system's response to inflammation. Additionally, frankincense has been shown to increase circulation and reduce oxidative stress, both of which are beneficial for skin health. As a result, frankincense capsules may help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis, such as redness, scaling, and itching, promoting clearer and healthier-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Frankincense contains boswellic acids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis, such as redness and swelling.

Immune-modulating: Frankincense has immunomodulatory effects, meaning it can regulate the immune system's response to inflammation and prevent overactive immune responses that contribute to psoriasis.
Antioxidant: Frankincense is rich in antioxidants, which help neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells and exacerbate psoriasis symptoms, such as scaling and discoloration.
remedy_constituents: Acetyl-11-keto-β-boswelllic acid (AKBA): AKBA has potent anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis.
α-Boswellic acid (ABA): ABA exhibits anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help reduce the severity of psoriasis by suppressing the production of inflammatory mediators.
Boswellic acids (β-boswellic acid): Boswellic acids have antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from oxidative stress, which can contribute to the development and progression of psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The resin from the roots of Boswellia serrata is used to make capsules for psoriasis, as it contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and itching associated with the condition.

Rhyzomes (or Resin): The resin from the rhyzomes of Boswellia serrata is used to make capsules for psoriasis, as it has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties that help alleviate symptoms.

Resin from the Rhyzomes (alternative description): The Boswellia serrata resin is used to make capsules for psoriasis, as it contains boswellic acids that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of the condition.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of dried boswellia serrata resin from a trusted supplier or your own trees.
Grind the dried resin into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500-750 mg of the ground resin powder with 250-500 mg of gelatin or vegetarian capsule filler.
Fill empty gelatin or vegetarian capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filler machine.
Label the capsules with the name boswellia serrata and the dosage 250-500 mg per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with psoriasis because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with the condition. The extract of saw palmetto berries has been shown to inhibit the production of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that contributes to the formation of psoriatic plaques. Additionally, saw palmetto capsules may also help to soothe and calm irritated skin, promoting a healthy inflammatory response and reducing the appearance of psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Saw palmetto's antioxidant properties may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with psoriasis, which can exacerbate symptoms such as redness, itching, and scaling.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Saw palmetto has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce the severity of psoriasis symptoms by decreasing inflammatory markers in the body, leading to improved skin health.

5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto's ability to inhibit 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme involved in testosterone metabolism, may help reduce the production of dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that can contribute to psoriasis symptoms and severity.
remedy_constituents: Fatty acids: Fatty acids present in Saw Palmetto may help reduce inflammation and modulate the immune system, which can contribute to the development and progression of psoriasis.
Sterols: Sterols, such as beta-sitosterol, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis by reducing skin inflammation and oxidative stress.

Alkaloids (including Ursolic acid): Ursolic acid, an alkaloid found in Saw Palmetto, has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with psoriasis, thereby alleviating symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are the primary part used due to their high concentration of saponins, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis.
Barks: The barks are also used as they contain flavonoids and other compounds that may aid in reducing inflammation and promoting skin health.
Roots: The roots are another important part used, as they are rich in prenylated ferulates and other compounds that may help to soothe and calm the skin affected by psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 250 milligrams of dried serenoa repens root powder.
Mix the weighed powder with 500 milligrams of cellulose powder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to two years.
Label and package the herbal capsules for individual dosing as needed daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with psoriasis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm irritated skin. The herb, glycyrrhizin, in licorice root has been shown to reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis. Additionally, licorice extract has been found to promote healing and regeneration of skin cells, helping to improve the appearance of lesions and plaques characteristic of psoriasis. By reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin cell growth, herbal licorice capsules can provide relief from the symptoms of this chronic skin condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Licorice root's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as glycyrrhizin, can reduce inflammation and swelling associated with psoriasis, helping to relieve symptoms like redness and itching.

Immunomodulatory effects: Herbal licorice capsules contain immunomodulators that can help regulate the immune system's response, which is often dysregulated in psoriasis, reducing the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and alleviating symptoms.

Antioxidant activity: Licorice root's antioxidant compounds can neutralize free radicals, which damage skin cells and contribute to psoriasis development; by scavenging these radicals, licorice may help prevent further skin damage and promote healing.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: A triterpenoid saponin that helps to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the skin, thereby alleviating psoriasis symptoms such as redness, itching, and scaling.

Licochalcone A: A flavonoid compound with potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the severity of psoriasis by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and promoting the production of anti-inflammatory cytokines.

Isoliquiritigenin: A flavonoid that has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to reduce the severity of psoriasis by suppressing the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and promoting the production of anti-inflammatory cytokines.
remedy_parts: Roots: They contain glycyrrhizin, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate psoriasis symptoms.
Roots: They also contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation and promote skin health.

Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various skin conditions, including psoriasis, due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties.
remedy_recipe: Extract 10 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root and grind it into a fine powder.
Mix 1 gram of the ground powder with 1 gram of gum arabic powder to form a blend.
Add 1 milliliter of glycerin to 10 milliliters of water and heat the mixture for 10 minutes.
Use a capsule filling machine to fill 100 capsules with 250 milligrams of the blend each.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Slippery elm capsules helps with psoriasis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce redness and swelling associated with the condition. The mucilage in slippery elm coats the gut, soothing digestive issues that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms like skin irritation and itching. Additionally, slippery elm's demulcent action creates a protective barrier on the skin's surface, helping to calm inflammation and promote healthy skin cell growth, resulting in clearer, smoother skin for individuals with psoriasis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Slippery elm's anti-inflammatory properties can reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with psoriasis, providing relief to affected skin areas.
Mucilaginous coating: The mucilage in slippery elm forms a protective barrier on the skin, soothing irritation, reducing irritation, and moisturizing dry patches often seen in psoriasis sufferers.
Antioxidant: Slippery elm's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to oxidative stress, which may exacerbate psoriasis symptoms like inflammation and cell damage.
remedy_constituents: Tannins: Help reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis by acting as astringents and binding to skin proteins, thereby reducing water loss and soothing irritated skin.

Flavonoids (specifically quercetin): Exert anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate the redness and swelling characteristic of psoriasis, as well as modulate the immune response to reduce disease severity.

Terpenes (including limonene and beta-pinene): Display antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help control skin infections and reduce inflammation that exacerbates psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried ulmus rubra bark with a focus on quality and freshness.
Grind 50g of the dried bark into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Combine the ground powder with 20g of vegetable cellulose using a small bowl and a spoon.
Fill 100 capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filler machine at a rate of 1 capsule per 0.5g.
Label and store the capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.
remedy_parts: Barks: The barks of Ulmus rubra are sometimes used in herbal remedies due to their anti-inflammatory properties.
Leaves: The leaves of Ulmus rubra have been traditionally used to treat various skin conditions, including psoriasis, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Roots: The roots of Ulmus rubra are sometimes used to treat skin conditions and inflammation due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with psoriasis because they provide anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that can help to calm down irritated skin. The mucilages present in marshmallows create a protective barrier on the skin, reducing redness and inflammation, while also promoting hydration and moisturization. This natural relief from discomfort and itching can greatly improve the quality of life for individuals suffering from psoriasis, allowing them to manage their symptoms more effectively without relying on harsh medications.
remedy_properties: Mucilages: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilages, which are thick, protective substances that soothe and moisturize the skin, helping to reduce inflammation and irritation associated with psoriasis.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Herbal marshmallows contain anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which may help reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with psoriasis by suppressing inflammatory responses in the body.

Soothing demulcents: Marshmallow capsules have a soothing effect on the skin due to their demulcent properties, which form a protective barrier that helps calm irritated skin, reducing itching, scaling, and flaking characteristic of psoriasis.
remedy_constituents: Mucilages: These complex carbohydrates help reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin, which can alleviate symptoms of psoriasis.
Phenolic acids: These compounds, particularly caffeic acid and ferulic acid, exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce the severity of psoriasis symptoms.

Flavonoids: Specifically, quercetin, a flavonoid present in Althaea officinalis, has anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help regulate the immune system and reduce inflammation associated with psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps soothe and protect the skin.
Leaves: Contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation and promote skin health.
Barks: Have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help calm and heal the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried althaea officinalis root and store it in an airtight container.
Crush the dried root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 100 mg of the powdered root with 50 mg of starch to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal blend using a capsule filler for 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in a cool dark place for 2 weeks to allow the flavors to mature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain a potent anti-inflammatory compound called calendula, which has been shown to reduce redness and swelling associated with the condition. The capsules also possess antimicrobial properties that help combat bacterial infections that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, pot marigold's antioxidant activity helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing itching and discomfort caused by psoriasis. By targeting these underlying factors, pot marigold capsules provide natural relief from psoriasis symptoms, promoting healthier and clearer skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot Marigold capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules' anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling, redness, and pain associated with psoriasis, alleviating discomfort and improving skin appearance.

Immunomodulatory properties: Pot Marigold's immunomodulating effects may help regulate the immune system's response to inflammation, potentially reducing psoriasis symptoms by addressing underlying immune dysregulation.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenoids (e.g., calendulin, calendulic acid, and oleanolic acid): These compounds help reduce inflammation and modulate the immune response, which can alleviate the symptoms of psoriasis.
Naphthoquinones (e.g., carotenoids and flavonoids): These antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to skin inflammation and damage associated with psoriasis.

Carotenoids (e.g., lutein, zeaxanthin, and beta-carotene): These compounds help reduce inflammation and promote skin regeneration, which can improve the appearance and health of skin affected by psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are used due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help in soothing and treating psoriasis symptoms.
Leaves: They are used due to their ability to provide antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which aid in reducing inflammation and promoting skin health.
Seeds: They are used due to their richness in essential fatty acids, which help in moisturizing and soothing the skin, reducing psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Dry the calendula flowers by spreading them out in a single layer on a paper towel for 2 days.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the powdered calendula with a binding agent such as gelatin to a ratio of 1:2.
Fill empty capsule shells with the calendula mixture using a small spoon and a measuring scoop.
Seal the capsule shells by pressing the two halves together firmly to create a tight seal.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort capsules helps with psoriasis because it is a natural anti-inflammatory agent that soothes irritated skin. The herb contains hyperforin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, common symptoms of psoriasis. By targeting the underlying causes of inflammation, St John's Wort may help alleviate symptoms such as redness, itching, and scaling. Additionally, its antioxidant properties can help repair damaged skin cells and promote healthy skin regeneration, leading to improved overall skin health and reduced psoriasis flares.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: This compound has anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis such as redness, swelling, and itching.
Hypericin: This pigment has antioxidant properties, which can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and oxidative stress, a common underlying factor in psoriasis.

Flavonoids and phenolic acids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help reduce inflammation, prevent infection, and promote wound healing in individuals with psoriasis.
remedy_constituents: Hyperforin: This terpene helps with psoriasis by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which contribute to inflammation and skin cell proliferation, thereby reducing psoriasis symptoms.

Quercetin: A flavonoid phenolic compound, quercetin helps with psoriasis by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress through its antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate psoriasis symptoms and promote skin healing.

Nortriterpene: Specifically, a nortriterpene called adhyperforin, found in Hypericum perforatum, has been shown to help with psoriasis by inhibiting the release of pro-inflammatory mediators and reducing the proliferation of skin cells, thereby reducing psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain hyperforin, a key compound responsible for the plant's therapeutic effects.
Flowers: Rich in flavonoids and hyperforin, the flowers contribute to the plant's anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Seeds: They are a good source of hyperforin, which is used to treat psoriasis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of fresh hypericum perforatum flowers and leaves on a sunny day with low humidity.
Dry the harvested plant material in a well-ventilated area at 50-60 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind 5 grams of dried hypericum perforatum flowers and leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 5 grams of the powder with 5 grams of gelatin in a small bowl to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the gelatin mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Longleaf pine capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm irritated skin. The capsules' active ingredients, such as beta-carotene and vitamin E, work to reduce redness and swelling, promoting a healthy balance in the body's response to inflammation. Additionally, longleaf pine's rich antioxidant properties help protect the skin from environmental stressors and oxidative damage, further supporting skin health and reducing psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Longleaf pine extract has been found to possess antioxidant properties, which could help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with psoriasis.
Anti-inflammatory effects: The extract may exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which could help alleviate the redness, swelling, and itching characteristic of psoriasis.

Wound-healing promotion: Longleaf pine has been traditionally used to treat wounds, and its extracts might promote wound healing by stimulating collagen synthesis, improving tissue elasticity, and enhancing the natural barrier function of skin.
remedy_constituents: Sterols: Pinus palustris contains sterols, which may help alleviate psoriasis symptoms by reducing inflammation and modulating the immune response.

Terpenes (including Limonene and Pinene): Terpenes present in Pinus palustris may possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing the severity of psoriasis symptoms.

Flavonoids (including Taxifolin and Quercetin): Flavonoids found in Pinus palustris may exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help regulate the immune response and reduce inflammation associated with psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Barks: Used to make capsules for various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
Seeds: Utilized to make capsules due to their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
Buds: Used in traditional medicine to make capsules due to their supposed anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest pinus palustris leaves and twigs from mature trees in a clean and safe environment outdoors.
Dry the harvested pinus palustris material in a well-ventilated area at 30-40 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind the dried pinus palustris material into a fine powder using a grinder at 1000 rpm.
Mix the pinus palustris powder with a binding agent in a ratio of 1:2 at 10 am for 30 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with the powdered mixture and seal immediately to preserve potency and freshness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with psoriasis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and irritation in the skin. The capsules contain isoflavones, a type of phytoestrogen that has been shown to alleviate symptoms of psoriasis by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin cell growth. Additionally, red clover's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, further contributing to its beneficial effects on psoriasis management.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover contains isoflavones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with psoriasis.

Phytoestrogens: The phytoestrogens in red clover capsules may help regulate estrogen levels in the body, which can alleviate symptoms of psoriasis such as itching, scaling, and inflammation by modulating hormonal imbalances.

Flavonoids: Red clover's flavonoid content, particularly the flavone tricetin, has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and immune system overactivity that contributes to psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Red clover roots have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions, including psoriasis, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Flowers: The flowers of red clover contain isoflavones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the skin, making them a valuable component for psoriasis treatment.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried trifolium pratense flowers from a reputable source.
Grind the dried trifolium pratense flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix one part of the powdered trifolium pratense flowers with two parts of silica gel and store in an airtight container for 30 days to allow for passive extraction.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with 500 milligrams of the extracted powder and seal tightly to prevent contamination.
Label and date the capsules, storing them in a cool dark place to preserve potency and shelf life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to soothe and calm irritated skin. The liver- and kidney-supporting properties of dandelion also aid in removing toxins from the body, which may contribute to flare-ups of psoriasis. Additionally, the natural antihistamines and immunomodulators present in dandelion capsules may help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis, such as itching, redness, and scaling.
remedy_properties: Choleretic properties: Dandelion capsules stimulate bile production and flow, which helps to detoxify the skin and reduce inflammation associated with psoriasis.

Antioxidant properties: Dandelion's antioxidant compounds help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms like redness and irritation.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion contains anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce swelling and inflammation in the skin, which is a common symptom of psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in inulin, a prebiotic fiber that helps soothe and calm irritated skin, making it an effective ingredient for treating psoriasis symptoms.
Seeds: High in omega-6 fatty acids, which can help reduce inflammation and promote healing of the skin, making them beneficial for managing psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried dandelion roots and leaves weighing about 100 grams.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm dark place for at least 24 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 250 milligrams of the ground herb with 500 milliliters of water to create an infusion.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared herb infusion mixture and store in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain a powerful anti-inflammatory compound called aloin, which soothes and calms irritated skin. This natural extract reduces redness and swelling, making it an effective treatment for managing psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, aloe's hydrating properties help to moisturize dry, itchy skin, reducing the appearance of scales and flaking. By promoting healthy skin cells and reducing inflammation, aloe capsules provide relief from psoriasis discomfort, allowing individuals to enjoy better overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with psoriasis.
Immunomodulatory activity: Herbal aloe capsules may modulate the immune system's response to inflammation, thereby reducing the activation of immune cells that contribute to psoriasis symptoms.
Antioxidant properties: Aloe vera's antioxidant compounds, such as vitamin C and E, help neutralize free radicals that can exacerbate oxidative stress and inflammation in psoriatic skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, which help reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis.
Rhyzomes: Containing a mixture of bioactive compounds like saponins and polysaccharides, which exhibit immunomodulatory effects, reducing symptoms of psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh aloe vera leaves from your garden or store-bought gel extract containing 95% aloin content weighing approximately 250 grams.
Crush the harvested aloe vera leaves into fine pieces using a blender or mortar and pestle to release the gel-like substance and fiber-rich pulp.
Mix the crushed aloe vera with 500 milliliters of distilled water in a large bowl allowing it to sit for 4 hours to activate the gel's natural properties.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or nut milk bag into another container removing any remaining fibers and sediment taking approximately 20 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the strained aloe vera mixture and seal them tightly for immediate use or store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort capsules helps with psoriasis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce redness and swelling associated with the condition. The herb also exhibits antioxidant activity, neutralizing free radicals that can exacerbate skin damage. Additionally, Asiatic pennywort has been shown to improve blood circulation, reducing plaque buildup and scaling characteristic of psoriasis. By addressing these underlying factors, the capsules provide comprehensive relief from psoriatic symptoms, promoting healthier and more balanced skin.
remedy_properties: Triterpenoids: These compounds have been shown to reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and improving skin barrier function.

Vasculin: This compound has been found to improve blood circulation and oxygenation, which can help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis such as redness, swelling, and scaling by reducing blood vessel constriction and increasing nutrient delivery to affected areas.

Cystosides: These compounds have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with psoriasis, thereby improving skin health and reducing the severity of symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in triterpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in soothing skin irritation associated with psoriasis.
Rhyzomes: Contains alkaloids and saponins that help reduce inflammation and itching, providing relief from psoriatic symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh centella asiatica leaves and stems from a trusted source, ensuring proper identification and quality control.
Dry the harvested plant material using air circulation or shade drying for 7-10 days to achieve optimal moisture content.
Grind dried centella asiatica into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle, yielding approximately 100g of processed herb.
Mix the ground centella asiatica with gelatin capsules in a ratio of 1:1 by weight, filling each capsule with 250mg of herbal extract.
Seal the filled capsules and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or freeze for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Borage capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a potent anti-inflammatory fatty acid that reduces inflammation and promotes skin health. GLA also regulates the body's production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. By taking borage capsules regularly, individuals with psoriasis may experience a reduction in redness, swelling, and itching, as well as an improvement in skin lesions and scaling. Additionally, borage's antioxidant properties help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals.
remedy_properties: Gamma-linolenic acid (GLA): GLA, an omega-6 fatty acid found in borage oil, has anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis.

Vitamin E: Vitamin E, present in borage capsules, acts as an antioxidant, protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promoting healthy skin cell growth, which may help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis.

Essential fatty acids: Borage oil's essential fatty acid content helps to reduce inflammation, moisturize the skin, and promote the synthesis of prostaglandins, which can aid in improving skin flexibility and reducing redness associated with psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contain bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with psoriasis.
Flowers: Rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in treating skin conditions like psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest borago officinalis flowers at peak bloom and dry them immediately using a food dehydrator or oven on low heat.
Grind the dried borago officinalis flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 seconds.
Sift the powdered borago officinalis through a fine-mesh strainer to remove any lumps or large particles.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the sifted borago officinalis powder and seal them immediately.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with psoriasis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with the condition. The capsules contain a concentrated extract of lavender oil, which has been traditionally used to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation. By taking English lavender capsules, individuals with psoriasis may experience improved skin health and reduced symptoms, allowing them to better manage their condition and improve their overall quality of life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, can reduce redness and swelling associated with psoriasis, providing relief from discomfort and promoting healing.

Antioxidant properties: Lavender's antioxidant compounds can help neutralize free radicals that contribute to skin damage and inflammation in psoriasis, protecting the skin and reducing oxidative stress.
Soothing and calming effects: The calming and sedative properties of lavender can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for psoriasis flares, allowing the skin to heal and relax.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the English lavender plant contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antipruritic properties, making them effective in reducing inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis.
Seeds: Lavender seeds are rich in essential fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals that help to soothe and calm skin irritations, providing relief from the symptoms of psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried lavandula angustifolia flowers from a reputable source for at least 250 grams of botanical material.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder within 30 minutes.
Mix 1000 milligrams of the ground flower powder with 500 milliliters of distilled water in a double boiler to create an infusion liquid for 45 minutes.
Strain the infusion mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean container and discard the solids within 15 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the resulting infused liquid and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain powerful anti-inflammatory compounds that target the underlying causes of the condition. The herbal extracts in these capsules work to reduce inflammation and itching, which can help alleviate symptoms such as redness, scaling, and discomfort. Additionally, elder capsules may also help regulate immune system function, which can contribute to the development of psoriasis. By addressing these underlying factors, elder capsules can provide natural relief from psoriasis symptoms and promote overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms such as redness, itching, and scaling.
Flavonoids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating effects, which can help reduce the activity of immune cells that are involved in psoriasis development and exacerbation.
Quercetin: This flavonoid has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals and cytokines, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms such as skin thickening and scarring.
remedy_parts: Roots: Elder roots have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce redness and swelling associated with psoriasis.
Barks: Elder barks contain compounds that soothe skin irritations and promote healing, making them effective in treating psoriatic plaques.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh sambucus nigra flowers or purchase dried sambucus nigra flower extract, ensuring a minimum of 0.2% isoquercitrin content.
Grind the dried sambucus nigra flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for approximately 5 minutes.
Mix 400mg of the ground sambucus nigra powder with 200mg of vitamin e oil in a small bowl, stirring well to combine ingredients.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the sambucus nigra-vitamin e mixture using a capsule filler or spoon, ensuring each capsule contains an equal amount of the mixture.
Store the prepared herbal sambucus nigra capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with this chronic skin condition. The capsules' antioxidant properties also work to combat oxidative stress, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms. Furthermore, maidenhair tree's ability to regulate immune function may help prevent excessive cell growth and reduce the appearance of psoriatic plaques. By addressing these underlying causes, maidenhair tree capsules offer a natural approach to managing psoriasis and promoting overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which is thought to contribute to the development of psoriatic plaques.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Maidenhair Tree capsules contain flavonoids and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory effects, which may help reduce redness, swelling, and discomfort associated with psoriasis.

Immunomodulatory effects: Ginkgo biloba's immunomodulatory properties may help regulate the immune system's response to triggers that can exacerbate psoriasis, such as stress or environmental factors.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Maidenhair Tree contain bioactive compounds that help to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritation, making them effective in treating psoriasis symptoms.

Barks: The barks of the Maidenhair Tree are rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them beneficial for reducing redness and inflammation associated with psoriasis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry high-quality ginkgo biloba leaves in shade for 7-10 days to preserve potency.
Grind 50 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle within 3 minutes.
Mix the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100 grams of kosher salt and 20 grams of tapioca starch in a large bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 250mg of the herbal mixture and seal tightly within 2 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for psoriasis are natural supplements made from various herbs that help alleviate symptoms of this chronic autoimmune disease. They work by reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritation, and promoting healthy skin cell growth. Some of the best herbal capsules for psoriasis include Silybum marianum, Urtica dioica, Curcuma longa, Aloe barbadensis, Taraxacum officinale, Avena sativa, Equisetum arvense, Aloe vera, Glycyrrhiza glabra, and Camellia sinensis. If left untreated, psoriasis can lead to emotional distress, social isolation, and decreased quality of life, making it essential to explore these herbal remedies for effective management and relief.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to psoriasis that are treated with herbal capsules are eczema, acne, and dermatitis. Herbal remedies such as turmeric, neem, and ginkgo biloba have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce redness. Capsules containing herbs like St. John's Wort and calendula may also be used to treat mild skin conditions and promote healing. These natural remedies can provide a gentle and effective alternative to traditional treatments for these conditions.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with psoriasis is a blend of turmeric, aloe vera, and evening primrose oil. Turmeric, rich in curcumin, reduces inflammation and promotes healing. Aloe vera soothes and calms irritated skin, while evening primrose oil provides essential fatty acids that support skin health. Additionally, capsules containing saw palmetto and omega-3 fatty acids can also be beneficial, as they reduce inflammation and promote skin regeneration. This combination may help alleviate psoriasis symptoms and promote overall skin health. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any new supplements.
